name: Output Ports and Port Output Trajectories
description: Definition of the set of output ports OPZ, the readout RjZ for each port, and the port output trajectories OTjZ generated by complete input trajectories.

elements.text: The set of output ports of the system Z is denoted OPZ: {O1Z, ..., OnZ} if OZ is a product, or {OZ} otherwise.
If #OPZ > 1 and j ∈ IJS[1, #OPZ], the readout to the jth output port is RjZ = PJN(OjZ) ∘ RZ.
If #OPZ > 1, f ∈ ITZ, x ∈ SZ and j ∈ IJS[1, #OPZ], then the OjZ output port trajectory is OTjZ(f, x) = PJN(OjZ) ∘ OTZ(f, x).
